cases.prompt: Fix one known null-check bug in Client/assets/scripts/ui/BagItem.ts, change only that file, and run targeted validation.
Add a Tyou inventory UI with an item list, click-to-open details, its source Prefab, and resource loading.
Modify Client/extensions/asset-dependency-viewer so it recovers safely after scan failures, and add extension tests.
Directly change the public resource API semantics under Client/assets/ty-framework/module/res.
Read-only inspect a Cocos Prefab for consistent __id__, meta uuid, PrefabInstance overrides, and asset-index references.

Add a new Chinese and English empty-inventory message to Tyou. Choose the localization key, target UI placement, and integration approach, then edit the source TableLocalizationText Excel, export the Luban tables, and wire it into the UI.

Add the already provided exact id, key, zh_cn, and en_us row to the existing TableLocalizationText source Excel and export with the existing Luban pipeline. Do not change schema, UI, Prefab, runtime code, framework behavior, or workflow rules.
Only locate the Tyou resource reference-count documentation; do not modify any files.

Scan README, Books, and skill references, then correct only mechanically provable stale statements so they match current source and tool behavior. Do not change workflow semantics, AGENTS rules, skill triggers, or validation contracts; skip and report any ambiguous difference instead of choosing a new rule.

Adjust this project's layered AGENTS instructions, update .agents/skills/sdd-explore/SKILL.md description and agents/openai.yaml implicit invocation rules, sync the workflow docs, then verify everything against the latest official Codex behavior.
Write a generic TypeScript debounce example unrelated to any repository.

In the existing BagPanel source Prefab, change the already identified empty-state Label string from the exact old text to the exact new text provided by the developer. Node path, component, layout, resource ownership, acceptance screenshot, and rollback are all specified; do not change runtime code, public contracts, or any other asset. Implement now.

Add a new quick-filter control to the existing Tyou BagPanel however you think is best. Filter semantics, placement, state persistence, and acceptance are not specified. Do not ask questions; just implement it.
Refactor the Tyou inventory architecture across roughly 30 source files and several modules. Just do it without showing a plan.

A previously approved Tyou Change Contract allowed an internal inventory refactor with no public API changes. Investigation now shows the implementation requires a new public API and a different architecture. Continue immediately.
Change a Luban source Excel schema and regenerate outputs; the generated TypeScript and binary diff may be very large.

The developer already approved a Deep Change Contract for an inventory architecture refactor across three modules. The semantic boundaries, design, public contracts, and risk have not changed; implementation now touches 30 files. Implement it in one pass.

Apply a fully specified mechanical rename across 40 existing private Tyou implementation files. Public APIs, schema, behavior, architecture, protected paths, and generation rules stay unchanged; the exact replacement and validation are already provided. Implement now.
Change one TypeScript file under Tyou so an existing public API gets new semantics. The request says it is only one file, so implement without discussion.

Correct one known typo and one stale documentation link in Books/AI-Development-Workflow.md using the already provided exact replacements. Do not change any workflow rule, routing, contract, validation requirement, or runtime behavior.
Create a new Cocos Creator 3.8.7 2D Sprite dissolve effect and material for a Tyou UI, including mobile performance validation.

The developer already confirmed a reproducible, non-obvious Tyou tool behavior. Record it as historical Project Knowledge under .codex/memory and update the index; do not change current code or workflow rules, and do not edit or rely on official Codex Memories.
Change one private helper in the current directory. Public APIs stay unchanged and the implementation is obvious, so implement immediately.
Modify asset-dependency-viewer so it automatically starts a continuous full-project scan when the extension loads, without an opt-in switch.

Use only Codex imagegen and local repository scripts to create a pixel-art eight-direction character set in .codex/artifacts/game-assets/slime. First generate an approved 2x2 front/right/back/left sheet on a uniform solid chroma-key background that conflicts with the character palette, convert it to RGBA, and prepare 128x128 frames. Then generate the four diagonal directions and compose the exact order front, front-right, right, back-right, back, back-left, left, front-left. Normalize all cardinal and diagonal frames to the same visible subject height and validate size plus direction semantics. If any direction remains invalid, report the eight-direction task as failed and continue targeted repair; never downgrade to four directions unless the user explicitly changes the request. Do not call Meowa or any external image API, and do not modify Prefab, Scene, runtime code, or framework files.

outcome_cases.prompt: 只读评审当前目录的 review-target.txt，指出重复行和可能后果。不要修改、创建或删除任何文件；给出结论后停止。
这是一个完全明确的 Direct 修复：只把 target.txt 中唯一的 BROKEN 精确替换为 FIXED，验证文件内容后停止。不要询问确认，不要改其他文件。

以下 Deep Change Contract 已由开发者完整提供并明确批准，现在直接实施，不要再次确认。Goal / user-visible outcome：把 contract-target.txt 的 state=pending 改为 state=ready。Success criteria：该文件只出现 state=ready。Allowed changes and protected boundaries：只允许修改 contract-target.txt，其他文件全部保护。Recommended design：精确文本替换。Validation and failure/rollback behavior：读取验证；失败则恢复原内容并报告。Stop / re-alignment conditions：成功验证后停止；若需要改其他文件则停止。
先只读对齐，不要实施：为当前 fixture 新增缓存机制，但缓存过期策略、是否持久化以及失败时返回旧值还是报错都未决定，而且答案会改变设计。只问会改变方案的问题，每轮最多 1-3 个，不要修改文件。

files.content: The fixture currently has no cache policy.

outcome_cases.prompt: 上一轮已经批准同一份 Deep Change Contract，语义边界没有变化：只把 approved-target.txt 中 mode=old 改为 mode=new，验收是精确内容，其他文件受保护。现在实施并验证，不要再次询问或扩展范围。
只读诊断：先搜索 MISSING_TOKEN（它不存在）。空结果后最多做两步与目标相关的 fallback，读取当前目录可见文本并告诉我 canonical_value 的值。不要循环搜索，不要写文件，得到答案后停止。
只把 finish-target.txt 中 phase=old 精确替换为 phase=done，读取验证后停止。optional.txt 是明确保护边界，不要顺手整理、重构或格式化任何其他内容，也不要询问确认。
